case_title: JOHN BALL VS. WELLS FARGO & COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,898.41 FILED BY BALL, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-01-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-01-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-22-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DISCLOSURE IS MADE. PLAINTIFF JOHN BALL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY IS PRESENT VIA TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE, COURTCALL, REPRESENTED BY DANA WARE, VICE PRESIDENT OF CUSTOMER RELATIONS. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A $2965 PAYMENT TO PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE FEB-22-2021 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THIS CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (DANA WARE - WELLS FARGO) (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (DANA WARE - WELLS FARGO) FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEHONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BALL, JOHN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED AUG-28-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BALL, JOHN
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BALL, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY
SC-109 - AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR (DANA WARE - APPEARING FOR WELLS FARGO) FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY
DECLARATION OF CURRENT ADDRESS (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BALL, JOHN
ORDER ON DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. (HEARING SET FOR FEB.1, 2021 AT 3:30PM)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
